channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Larry Magid: Testing DeepSeek, the Chinese generative AI app
item.description: Based on my tests and published reports, DeepSeek not yet as advanced as its American counterparts, but it’s quite good
item.dc:creator: Larry Magid, The Mercury News

item.title: US cyber agency's future role in elections remains murky under the Trump administration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The nation’s cybersecurity agency has played a critical role in helping states shore up the defenses of their voting systems, but its election mission appears uncertain amid sustained criticism from Republicans and key figures in the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Where to buy Nvidia RTX 5090: launch day is today, and these are the retailers I'd check
item.description: The Nvidia RTX 5090 is an absolute powerhouse of a GPU, and it's unsurprisingly going to be in high demand. Here's where we recommend you look for one when it goes on sale today.
item.dc:creator: christian.guyton@futurenet.com (Christian Guyton), TechRadar

item.title: PSN accounts will now be optional for some PlayStation games on PC, but there will be 'incentives' for users who link them
item.description: Sony has announced it will be dropping the PlayStation Network account requirement for some PC versions of its games.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Trump World learns how to deal with Musk
item.description: President Trump’s allies and aides are learning to deal with Tesla CEO Elon Musk, who has had a consistent presence in the early days of the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Cognitive Labs, el impulso de Ericsson a la investigación en IA de código abierto
item.description: Ericsson ha lanzado Cognitive Labs, una iniciativa de carácter innovador dedicada a la investigación y el desarrollo en inteligencia artificial (IA).
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Principal Financial’s Kathy Kay on customer-centric IT leadership
item.description: Kathy Kay is a senior IT executive who enables business success by driving simplicity in a complex world.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Zuckerberg hails Trump administration on Meta earnings call
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg on Wednesday praised President Trump’s administration and said he looks forward to “redefining” the relationship the tech giant has with governments.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Microsoft Sees 10% Profit Growth, Beats Expectations Despite Cloud Computing Miss
item.description: Microsoft reports a 10% profit growth for the October-December quarter, beating Wall Street expectations despite missing projections for its cloud computing business.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Cybersecurity has had its ups and downs as we head into 2025
item.description: Last year was an eventful one on the cybersecurity front. But big cyber developments in the federal scape are expected in 2025. The post Cybersecurity has had its ups and downs as we head into 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: SAP: Latest news and insights
item.description: SAP is an enterprise software vendor based in Walldorf, Germany. Its cloud and on-premises enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, including S/4HANA, helps organizations manage their business operations and customer relations.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 200 UK companies adopt a permanent four-day work week
item.description: Two years after participating in a groundbreaking four-day work week experiment, 200 companies in the UK have chosen to adopt the policy permanently, marking a significant shift in workplace norms.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Industry coalition presses DOGE to act on digital identity
item.description: Digital identity advocates are calling on Trump administration to boost the use of mobile drivers licenses and other digital identity verification use cases. The post Industry coalition presses DOGE to act on digital identity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: The Rise of DeepSeek: A Wake-Up Call for the American AI Industry
item.description: The emergence of DeepSeek, a Chinese AI app, has sparked concerns over national security risks, data privacy issues, and potential intellectual property theft, raising alarms across the US and Europe.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump’s 100% tariff threat on Taiwan chips raises cost, supply chain fears
item.description: President Donald Trump has suggested plans to impose tariffs of up to 100% on semiconductors imported from Taiwan, aiming to boost US manufacturing but risking higher costs and supply chain disruptions for tech firms and enterprises.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Boom Supersonic’s XB-1 breaks the sound barrier—the first private aircraft to do so
item.description: About 35,000 feet (10,670 meters) over the Mojave Desert, northwest of Los Angeles, Boom Supersonic’s XB-1 became the first privately funded airplane to break the sound barrier during a test flight on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Trump says Microsoft in talks to buy TikTok
item.description: President Trump on Monday said Microsoft is one of the technology companies eyeing TikTok to keep the app in the United States amid a looming government ban. When asked if Microsoft was one of the companies in talks for the popular video-sharing app, Trump told reporters, "I would say yes.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: High-speed Ethernet switches a bright spot in network forecasts
item.description: Switches and routers remain the workhorses of the networking world. Viewed through that lens, 2024 offered a mixed bag of results for the networking market. There were numerous areas of decline, particularly in the enterprise market, according to some analysts.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Scammers find sneaky way to bypass your iPhone's safety features
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says cybercriminals are exploiting iMessage phishing protection, tricking users to reactivate links.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Families sue TikTok in France over teen suicides they say are linked to harmful content
item.description: CASSIS, France (AP) — In the moment when her world shattered three years ago, Stephanie Mistre found her 15-year-old daughter, Marie, lifeless in the bedroom where she died by suicide.
item.dc:creator: TOM NOUVIAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Bun 1.2 squashes Node.js compatibility bugs
item.description: Bun 1.2, an update to the all-in-one runtime and toolkit for building, running, and testing full-stack JavaScript and TypeScript applications, has arrived, boasting dramatic improvements in Node.js compatibility.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: People are hawking TikTok-loaded phones for thousands on eBay, Facebook
item.description: People are listing phones preloaded with TikTok for tens of thousands of dollars on eBay, Facebook marketplace and other online storefronts — though it is not clear if there are many buyers at those prices. TikTok was briefly unavailable to U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: More questions than answers around Trump’s Stargate AI plans
item.description: In its second day of operation, the Trump administration announced a $500 billion private sector initiative called Stargate intending to build AI infrastructure across the United States and create over 100,000 U.S. jobs. But questions about the project abound. Pres.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Robotic dog helps those facing mental health and cognitive challenges
item.description: A U.S. robotics company has developed "Jennie," a robotic pet powered by artificial intelligence that's designed to comfort those facing mental health challenges.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
